question: Track GPU memory usage during training. Use torch.cuda.memory_allocated() to measure memory before and after model creation.
code_hint: Use torch.cuda.memory_allocated() to get allocated bytes. Use model.to('cuda') to move model to GPU.
expected_output:
Memory before model: 0 bytes
Memory after model: [VALUE] bytes
Memory diff: [VALUE] bytes
template:
import torch
import torch.nn as nn

# Track memory before model
mem_before = ???
print(f"Memory before model: {mem_before} bytes")

# Create a simple model
model = nn.Sequential(
    nn.Linear(1024, 2048),
    nn.ReLU(),
    nn.Linear(2048, 512),
).???

# Track memory after model
mem_after = ???
print(f"Memory after model: {mem_after} bytes")
print(f"Memory diff: {mem_after - mem_before} bytes")
